subcodes.title: Words to Nuru'd-Din Mumtazi et al in May 1920
subcodes.first_line: You, dear ones, must remember that whatever happens is for the progress of the Cause of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدانید و مطمئن باشید که آنچه واقع می شود باعث اعلای امر الله است وقتی حضرت اعلی شهید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @martyrdom of the Bab, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
